allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: resolve build errors — lint, type issues, and framer-motion API usage

Fix unused variables, replace `any` types with `Record<string, unknown>`,
add null checks for admin password, use correct `amount` prop instead of
`threshold` for framer-motion useInView, and escape special characters in JSX.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in Dockerfile docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yaml deploy.sh nginx.conf .dockerignore)
Bash(echo python-docx not available, trying alternative:*)

Bash(cd "H:/Coding/Project" && pip install python-docx 2>&1 | tail -3 && python3 -c "
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('График ИО на 2026.docx'\)
for i, table in enumerate\(doc.tables\):
    print\(f'Table {i}:'\)
    for j, row in enumerate\(table.rows\):
        cells = [cell.text for cell in row.cells]
        print\(f'  Row {j}: {cells}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "H:/Coding/Project" && python -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('График ИО на 2026.docx'\)
for i, table in enumerate\(doc.tables\):
    print\(f'Table {i}:'\)
    for j, row in enumerate\(table.rows[:2]\):
        cells = [cell.text for cell in row.cells]
        print\(f'  Row {j}: {cells}'\)
    print\(\)
for p in doc.paragraphs[:10]:
    if p.text.strip\(\):
        print\(f'Para: {p.text}'\)
" 2>&1)
